title: The most insane week in AI
summary: YouTube video summarizing major AI developments in a single week, including model releases from DeepSeek, Kimi, MiMo, OpenAI, Qwen, Tencent, and Xiaomi, plus research projects in vision, robotics, and game environments. The compilation emphasizes rapid pace of AI advancement across multiple companies and research groups.
